title: gymnogramma boucheana
intro: Gymnogramma boucheana, also known as Bouche's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues, due to its antioxidant and expectorant properties. Gymnogramma boucheana is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
